enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a playful and energetic vibe about falling in love, emphasizing the excitement of romantic connections.

How does this song fit into the plot of Singam 3?

This song showcases a light-hearted moment in the film, reflecting the protagonist's romantic escapades amidst action.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Karthik and Nikita Gandhi.

Who composed the music for this track?

The music for Wi Wi Wi Wi WiFi was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was this song released?

The song was released on November 27, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Wi Wi Wi Wi WiFi, the playful lyrics and upbeat rhythm create a lively atmosphere that resonates with the excitement of young love. The song captures the essence of romance, making it a perfect backdrop for the light-hearted moments in Singam 3. With its catchy hooks and energetic beats, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration. This track is not just a song but an anthem for those in love, making it a favorite at parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Wi Wi Wi Wi WiFi from Singam 3 is a vibrant and catchy track that perfectly encapsulates the energy of youthful romance. With the dynamic vocals of Karthik and Nikita Gandhi, this song is sure to get you dancing. The infectious beats crafted by Harrish Jeyaraj make it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their mood!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, what are you asking about WiFi? You push away a like, and show me the disaster with your eyes.
Fall in love, you better fall in love.
A WiFi that is nice, you push away a like.
You show me the disaster with your eyes, girl in love, you crazy girl in love.
Sophia, Sophia, I also joke about love, you talk a lot, you are very crazy, mafia, mafia, you are hot, will coffee come when you arrive?
Hey, what are you asking about WiFi? You push away a like, and show me the disaster with your eyes.
Fall in love, you better fall in love.
I will ride on your bike, the dizziness will come from behind.
Walking in the evening, chatting in the night, life is all about dating, it's good.
When will you ask me to go on a holiday?
In the photo, I will stand and give a kiss, I will be in your thoughts.
A WiFi that is nice, you push away a like.
Fall in love, you better fall in love.
In my life, will love come like a rifle?
I will catch you with my eyes, I am scared to touch you.
My anger is high, my speed is high, I have made a declaration.
I have put a plan to sell everything.
I have understood you, I have broken the barrier in front of you.
Hey, what are you asking about WiFi? You push away a like, and show me the disaster with your eyes.
Fall in love, you better fall in love, kilae kilae kilae, kilae kilae kilae, kilae, oh uncle...
